sources.name: AniPub
sources.description: Online AniPub catalog addon loaded from all AniPub catalog pages with /api/info/:id gap filling. Direct mp4/m3u8 links use the main player; iframe links play inside AnimeTV with the embedded player.

sources.name: Anime1v (Japanese + Spanish Subs)
sources.description: Local Anime1v proxy for Japanese audio with Spanish subtitles when available. Requires Anime1v running at http://localhost:3001. If Anime1v returns 401, start AnimeTV with ANIME1V_API_KEY set. Providers: AnimeAV1, TioAnime, MonosChinos, AnimeFLV, JKAnime.

sources.name: JIMOV TioAnime (JP + Spanish Subs)
sources.description: JIMOV open-source TioAnime connector. Uses Japanese audio with Spanish subtitles when available. Direct file_url plays in the main player; embed servers stay in the embedded player.

sources.name: My Local Anime Catalog
sources.description: Enable this after your own legal server returns anime items with title, image, description, videoUrl, or an episodes array.

sources.name: TioAnime Metadata Addon
sources.description: Optional local addon using carlosfdezb/tioanime for catalog and episode metadata only. Install with npm install tioanime, then restart AnimeTV.

sources.name: Anime1v API
sources.description: Enable when your local Anime1v adapter returns normalized catalog JSON. Use only with sources you are allowed to access.

sources.name: Jutsu API
sources.description: Enable when your local Jutsu adapter returns normalized catalog JSON. The app will merge by MAL/AniList ID or title.

sources.name: Anipy Server
sources.description: Enable when your local Anipy adapter returns normalized catalog JSON with title, image, banner, description, videoUrl, or episodes.

sources.name: Jimov API
sources.description: Enable when your local Jimov adapter returns normalized catalog JSON.

sources.name: Custom Local Anime Adapter
sources.description: Use local or online sources you are allowed to access. The app expects normalized catalog JSON, not scraper-specific responses.
